title: Prompt Tuner Example
subtitle: Tune prompts with a live preview and export controls.

sections.heading: Prompt Tuner in use
sections.body: This editor shows a prompt-tuning surface with roles, constraints, and an output preview rather than an empty textarea.

cards.title: Instruction
cards.body: Render a white light-mode VPK HTML demo using existing token names.

cards.title: Constraint
cards.body: No remote assets, no unresolved placeholders, and no generated examples without substance.

cards.title: Preview
cards.body: A reader should understand the template from the rendered page alone.

sections.heading: Editable prompt payload
sections.body: Tune the prompt JSON and export the result for a rendering run.

cards.title: System
cards.body: Use VPK semantic tokens and light-mode white surfaces.

cards.title: Developer
cards.body: Prefer structured sections over raw HTML unless a figure needs inline SVG.

cards.title: User
cards.body: Make the clickable demos show real content.
